title: codereview: NodeId::from_ipv6 lacks unit test coverage
description: New method added in addr.rs:52 should have test similar to link_local_addr tests verifying roundtrip with ula_addr or link_local_addr. P3 test coverage. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-yufp
close_reason: Fixed per codereview: added NodeId::from_ipv6 + roundtrip test (independent oracle via construction/equality, covers both link-local+ULA); gateway/RPL tests and time handling updated in current refactor; cargo test -p lichen-core -p lichen-gateway + clippy passed clean. No human labels, no bikeshed, full verification.
